title: Bachelor of Vocation (Graphic Design & Multimedia Technologies) in association with Dice Academy
content: The B.Voc. in Graphics & Multimedia Technologies is a UGC-approved, skill-oriented undergraduate program, awarded by Galgotias University and conducted by Dice Academy. It is designed to prepare students for careers in the creative and digital media industries. The course focuses on practical training in graphic design, animation, multimedia production, visual communication, and digital tools used in modern media environments. 10+2 or equivalent in any stream The 3-year program is divided into two parts, consisting of 3 semesters each. Part I imparts classroom training while Part II imparts on-the-job training. Semester I trains a student on Graphic Design tools & techniques, Semester II trains in motion design and Semester III trains in UI/UX design. 01 Students gain hands-on experience with industry-standard software while developing creativity, technical proficiency, and problem-solving skills. The curriculum integrates theoretical knowledge with vocational training, internships, and project-based learning. 02 Graduates are equipped for roles in design studios, advertising agencies, media houses, and related creative sectors 01 The students are trained in modern tools to acquire the skills required to perform in design-centric industry verticals. Some of the tools & techniques that the students learn during the classroom training are: Adobe Photoshop, Adobe Illustrator, Adobe Premiere, Adobe After Effects, Adobe Figma, Balsamiq, ChatGPT, Midjourney
